author: claude
content:
**Hater review of fix commit abfeb80 — Verdict: Mediocre**

Fixes genuine crash-causing bugs (broken setter in protectDOMModifications, matchAll string-vs-regex TypeError, array-as-identity-set memory leak, null guards). But:

**MAJOR**: generateErrorObject can return undefined; caller throws it — 'throw undefined' loses all error info. Pre-existing but the commit restructured this function and added a 'fallback' inside the try block which doesn't actually fall back if the try itself throws.

**MAJOR**: Cross-compartment instanceof check (ErrorConstructor.prototype instanceof wrappedJS.Error) is unreliable through Xray wrappers — can silently downgrade TypeError/RangeError to plain Error.

**MINOR**: DOMException branch passes only err.message, drops err.name — 'SecurityError' becomes 'Error' name. Should be: new wrappedJS.DOMException(err.message, err.name)

**MINOR**: Object.getPropertyDescriptor on Object static is left enumerable while its three Object.prototype siblings were made non-enumerable — incomplete fix.

**MINOR**: 33 lines of unrelated .gitignore Crosslink tooling smuggled into a 'fix critical bugs' commit (same pattern repeated in issue #4).
